arts.ttl: How to watch Leicester vs Man City - TV, live stream details and kick-off time - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: Leicester City return to Premier League action this afternoon when they host Manchester City at the King Power Stadium. Here, Leicestershire Live take a look at the TV info needed for Leicester City's clash against Manchester City in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Leicester City team news v Manchester City as Ruud van Nistelrooy makes two changes
arts.sum: City (4-2-3-1): Stolarczyk; Justin, Coady, Vestergaard, Kristiansen; Winks, Soumare; Buonanotte, El Khannouss, Mavididi; Vardy. Meanwhile, Buonanotte makes his first start in five matches under Ruud van Nistelrooy, coming in for the suspended Jordan Ayew on the right wing.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola Reaches Manchester City Milestone vs. Leicester
arts.sum: The 53-year-old will become only the second person to preside over 500 matches as Manchester City manager.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca tips Premier League star sold by Man City for 'important' England role
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca previously worked with Ipswich striker Liam Delap at Manchester City and he believes the 21-year-old can go on to become a key player for England
